title: Secret Life of Pen Pen
wikitext:
[]: Secret Life of Pen Pen             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Jun 04, 2009 11:03 pm When the pilots and other people are away, Pen Pen is home by himself with nobody around. During off-screen time, what do you think he's up to? Can be serious or silly. I think when Pen Pen is by himself, he secretly pays all the bills and keeps all the finances in check. So while Misato is making money at work Pen Pen keeps the apartment up and running. Misato is drunk to the point where her blood is flammable often, so she probably thinks she pays the bills herself when drunk. When Pen Pen got sent away, he put a large amount of money in Misato's savings account from his payment for assassinating Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jun 04, 2009 11:38 pm Pen^2 has an advice column in the a Tokyo-3 daily newspaper, under the pen name "Manuela Veracruz". Basically he just watches Dr. Phil and repeats the gist of whatever he said.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Thu Jun 04, 2009 11:39 pm Pen Pen is Anno

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jun 04, 2009 11:53 pm he just reads the paper, they show it :P

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 05, 2009 12:50 am He's at the zoo's penguin tank chillin' with his hoochies, obviously...

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Jun 05, 2009 1:24 am Captain_Morgan wrote: Pen Pen is Anno

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Jun 05, 2009 3:00 am I found his website years ago. Although he's being coy, calling himself "Pen3", he even tries to pass himself off as "more intelligent" and such than "Pen2".

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jun 05, 2009 6:15 am He works on his synchro tests...

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri Jun 05, 2009 2:57 pm He writes his multi-volume memoir, In Search of Lost Krill .

[]:             Quote Post by GAP » Fri Jun 05, 2009 4:30 pm Maybe he is the real instigator behind the Second impact, the Third Impact or even the found er of SEELE! O_O

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Jun 05, 2009 5:07 pm GAP wrote: Maybe he is the real instigator behind the Second impact, the Third Impact or even the found er of SEELE! O_O

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Jun 05, 2009 6:45 pm He likes to watch Woody Woodpecker cartoons when everyone's away.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Sat Jun 06, 2009 12:49 am Mods his fridge, then watches cars pass by outside.

[]:             Quote Post by Arekusu » Sat Jun 06, 2009 11:38 am GAP wrote: Maybe he is the real instigator behind the Second impact, the Third Impact or even the found er of SEELE! O_O

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Sat Jun 06, 2009 11:52 am He spends his days drinking beer, listening to classical music, and feeling lonely.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Jun 06, 2009 1:03 pm drinking beer and getting laid

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sat Jun 06, 2009 3:32 pm He manipulates everyone in the series, he orchestrated 2nd impact because a female penguin prefered a surfer penguin. He is manipulated the fates of millions across the Multi/Meta-verse. Everything in life and Death and beyond is part of his great plan, his grand scheme, his scenario. where are all his puppets, even us fans in our "real world" he is behind the the curtain of a fantasy our world is, behind your goverment, behind your faith. all in all, Everything goes just as planned for him.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Sat Jun 06, 2009 7:18 pm soljerameelguy wrote: He manipulates everyone in the series, he orchestrated 2nd impact because a female penguin prefered a surfer penguin. He is manipulated the fates of millions across the Multi/Meta-verse. Everything in life and Death and beyond is part of his great plan, his grand scheme, his scenario. where are all his puppets, even us fans in our "real world" he is behind the the curtain of a fantasy our world is, behind your goverment, behind your faith. all in all, Everything goes just as planned for him.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Mon Jun 15, 2009 2:39 am Shinji and Warhammer 40K fanwanks this, although I can't recall how exactly it does so off-hand. (I do know that Shinji has an affinity for everyone's favorite Emperor Penguin in that fic, however. It's hilarious.)

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Mon Jun 15, 2009 4:03 am Pen Pen lays back with a beer and watches old Facts of Life episodes while he controls the Angels.
